scripts.dev:
node -e "console.log('
Project Mafia dev servers
  Next.js:   http://localhost:3000
  Storybook: http://localhost:6006
  Server:    http://localhost:4000
')" && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --pad-prefix --names "Next.js,Storybook,Server" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "yarn --cwd client next dev -p 3000" "yarn --cwd client storybook --exact-port" "yarn --cwd server dev"
